ideation: This sequence depicts a shrug, conveying uncertainty or indifference.  The arms will move in a synchronized, slightly exaggerated manner to emphasize the gesture.  The palms will face upward to enhance the feeling of helplessness or questioning. I will use slight variations in wrist and joint angles between frames to avoid rigidity.

frames.beat: arms hang down, palms up, ready to shrug
arms lift slightly, palms still up, questioning
arms lift higher, a clear gesture of not knowing
arms begin to lower, the shrug concludes
arms return to rest, a final shrug
